name: Cabbage and Bacon (Irish)
recipeIngredient: 1 large Savoy cabbage or 2 small Savoy cabbages
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cabbage in half and boil for 15 minutes in salted water.
2. Drain the cabbage, then soak it in cold water for about one minute.
3. Drain the cabbage well and slice it thinly.
4. Line a casserole dish with half of the bacon strips.
5. Place the sliced cabbage on top of the bacon.
6. Add the seasonings (salt and pepper) and allspice berries to the cabbage.
7. Pour enough stock into the casserole to barely cover the ingredients.
8. Cover the casserole with foil or a lid and simmer for one hour, stirring occasionally, until most of the liquid is absorbed.
Note: Remove the casserole from heat and allow it to cool before serving.
